/opt/ls_2k0300_env/loongson-gnu-toolchain-8.3-x86_64-loongarch64-linux-gnu-rc1.6/bin/loongarch64-linux-gnu-g++  -O3 -pthread -Wall -lrt -lpthread CMakeFiles/tcp.dir/main.cpp.o -o tcp  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.10.0 /opt/ls_2k0300_env/opencv_4_10_build/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.10.0
